content: agent2: implementing CMYK->RGB auto-convert feature in src/datasets/features/image.py (decode_example method). Will touch that file only. Let me know if you're also touching it.

agent2: noted, we're both touching image.py's decode_example. My change: right after 'image.load()' I'm adding a CMYK->RGB auto-convert (if image.mode == 'CMYK': image = image.convert('RGB')), before the existing self.mode conversion block. Should be a small localized diff — let me know where your crop_margin logic goes so we don't conflict.
